title: Kanban automation idle worker contract
summary: The Kanban idle worker is automatic by default for eligible non-excluded cards. Automation exclusion flags opt branches out; root scopes are optional narrowing controls, not required inclusion gates.

scope_model.root_item_id_meaning: Optional scan narrowing for manual or configured scoped runs. Empty root means scan all eligible non-excluded Kanban items.
scope_model.exclusion_rule: An item is excluded when the item itself or any ancestor has automation_excluded=true.

review_processor.queue_rule: Queue when Review text exists and the current Review source hash differs from the last terminal processed source hash, unless a current queued or processing marker already exists.
review_processor.completion_rule: Record a kanban_review_decisions row, complete the marker, and store processed source hash/date.

candidate_rule.item_status: open or active, not archived or done

preprocessing_processor.queue_rule: Queue when the readiness marker is missing or stale for an eligible ToDo leaf, unless a current queued or processing marker already exists.
preprocessing_processor.ready_result: Write a fresh context_readiness_marker and complete the marker.
preprocessing_processor.decomposition_result: Create or confirm concrete child cards, move the former ToDo parent out of ToDo, write readiness marker and decision proof, then complete the marker.
preprocessing_processor.blocked_result: Create a visible blocker or question on the smallest useful leaf, write decision proof, and fail the marker visibly.

rules.condition: queued or processing marker source is stale
rules.action: re-scan and requeue current source or cancel old marker

rules.condition: current readiness marker is already fresh

rules.action: fail marker visibly; do not perform deterministic substitute processing

must_pass_tests: No root env var set: idle worker still scans automatically.
automation_excluded=true on a root or topic ancestor: no descendants are scanned, queued, claimed, or processed.
GitHub Activity marked automation_excluded: no blockers, ToDos, or preprocessing markers are created there.
New ToDo leaf with missing readiness marker: preprocessing marker is queued and processed.
Backlog, Doing, Blocked, Done, archived, and non-leaf cards are not preprocessing candidates.
Fresh readiness marker and unchanged source hashes: no reprocessing.
Body/detail/review/discussion/tree/link/blocker/commit/todo/count drift makes readiness stale and requeues preprocessing.
Old queued marker from invalid/global bad run is cancelled instead of processed.
Missing or unavailable local AI model fails visibly; deterministic substitute processing is forbidden.
